title: Meta drops out of a major clean energy pact as its natural gas buildout accelerates
summary: Over the past year, Meta has funded the construction of at least a dozen natural gas power plants, including one project alone that will burn enough natural gas to generate as much electricity as the entire state of South Dakota uses.
